products.name: Organic Quinoa
products.description: Our premium organic quinoa is sourced from the Andes Mountains, providing a rich and nutty flavor with a delicate texture. Packed with protein, fiber, and essential nutrients, it's perfect for salads, stir-fries, and pilafs.

products.name: Columbia Medium Roast Coffee Beans
products.description: Sourced from the high-altitude regions of Colombia, these beans are expertly roasted to perfection, delivering a balanced flavor profile with hints of caramel and chocolate.

products.name: Stainless Steel Insulated Water Bottle
products.description: Double-walled vacuum insulation keeps your drinks hot for 12 hours and cold for 24 hours. The leak-proof design and wide mouth make it easy to fill and clean.

products.name: Bluetooth Wireless Earbuds
products.description: Ergonomically designed for comfort and stability, these earbuds deliver high-quality sound with deep bass and clear treble. With touch controls and a portable charging case.

products.name: Nintendo Switch
products.description: Play anytime, anywhere, with the versatility of a handheld console and a home gaming system. With its innovative Joy-Con controllers and wide selection of games.

products.name: Apple MacBook Pro
products.description: Featuring a stunning Retina display, powerful processors, and up to 16GB of RAM. With all-day battery life and macOS, you can work, create, and innovate wherever you go.

products.name: Sony PlayStation 5
products.description: Featuring lightning-fast load times, immersive 3D audio, and stunning 4K graphics. With an innovative DualSense controller and a library of exclusive titles.

products.name: Portable Outdoor Camping Tent
products.description: Made from durable materials and featuring waterproof construction, it provides reliable shelter in any weather. Easy setup and compact storage make it perfect for adventure.

products.name: Nike Air Zoom Pegasus Running Shoes
products.description: Featuring responsive Zoom Air cushioning and a lightweight mesh upper, they provide comfort and support mile after mile with a sleek design and durable rubber outsole.

products.name: Smart WiFi Light Bulb
products.description: Compatible with voice assistants and mobile apps, control brightness, color, and scheduling from anywhere. Set the mood for any occasion with millions of color options.

products.name: JBL Flip 5 Waterproof Portable Speaker
products.description: With its rugged design and IPX7 waterproof rating, perfect for beach days and outdoor adventures. Featuring powerful sound and 12 hours of battery life.

products.name: Canon EOS Rebel T7 DSLR Camera
products.description: Featuring a 24.1-megapixel sensor and DIGIC 4+ image processor, it delivers stunning photos and Full HD videos. With built-in WiFi and NFC for instant sharing.

products.name: FIFA 22 – PlayStation 4
products.description: Featuring realistic gameplay and stunning graphics with HyperMotion technology and Career Mode enhancements. Endless hours of entertainment for soccer fans.

products.name: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
products.description: Explore a vast kingdom filled with breathtaking landscapes, ancient ruins, and challenging puzzles. With endless possibilities and surprises around every corner.

products.name: Leather Messenger Bag
products.description: Crafted from genuine leather with antique brass hardware. Multiple compartments and a padded laptop sleeve make it ideal for work, travel, and everyday use.

products.name: Fitbit Charge 5 Fitness Tracker
products.description: With advanced sensors and built-in GPS, it provides real-time stats and insights for workouts, sleep, and stress management. Stay connected with call and text notifications.

products.name: Gourmet Chocolate Truffles
products.description: Handcrafted from the finest Belgian chocolate and infused with flavors like raspberry, caramel, and hazelnut. Each truffle is a taste sensation perfect as a gift or personal treat.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy Watch 4
products.description: Featuring advanced health tracking, GPS navigation, and customizable watch faces. With seamless integration with your favorite apps and services.

products.name: Lemon Lime Soda
products.description: Made with real citrus extracts and natural flavors, it's a crisp and tangy drink perfect for any occasion. Enjoy it chilled or mix with your favorite spirits for a zesty cocktail.

products.name: Tropical Fruit Smoothie Mix
products.description: Bursting with the flavors of mango, pineapple, and passionfruit. Just add your favorite liquid and blend for a taste of the tropics anytime, anywhere.

products.name: Spicy Jalapeno Chips
products.description: Made with real jalapeno peppers and a hint of lime. A bold and flavorful treat that's perfect for spice lovers during game night or movie time.

products.name: Hawaiian BBQ Sauce
products.description: Made with authentic ingredients like pineapple, soy sauce, and ginger. A sweet and tangy sauce perfect for grilling, dipping, or marinating. Add a taste of aloha to your meal.

products.name: PlayStation 4 DualShock Wireless Controller
products.description: Featuring improved ergonomics and responsive controls, it offers precision and comfort for hours of gameplay. Built-in motion sensors and a touchpad open up new possibilities.

products.name: Nintendo Switch Pro Controller
products.description: Featuring a comfortable grip, responsive buttons, and motion controls. With a rechargeable battery and wireless connectivity, it's the perfect accessory for serious gamers.

products.name: Wireless Charging Pad
products.description: Compatible with Qi-enabled smartphones and other devices, it delivers fast and efficient charging without the need for cables. Sleek and compact design for home or office.

products.name: Cotton Canvas Tote Bag
products.description: Made from durable canvas with reinforced stitching. Spacious interior and comfortable handles make it a practical and eco-friendly alternative to plastic bags.

products.name: Wireless Noise-Canceling Headphones
products.description: Featuring advanced ANC technology that blocks out external noise for a truly immersive listening experience. Bluetooth connectivity and long-lasting battery life.

products.name: Raspberry Pi 4 Model B
products.description: Featuring a powerful quad-core processor, dual 4K display support, and up to 8GB of RAM. Perfect for DIY projects, coding, and learning about technology.

products.name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 Electric Pressure Cooker
products.description: Seven functions including pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, and steamer. Programmable settings and large capacity, perfect for busy families and aspiring chefs.

products.name: Amazon Echo Dot (4th Gen)
products.description: With its sleek design and improved sound quality, it's the perfect smart speaker for any room. Control your smart home devices, play music, set alarms, and more with just your voice.

products.name: LEGO Creator 3-in-1 Exotic Parrot
products.description: Build a colourful parrot, then rebuild it into a toucan or a frog! This LEGO Creator 3-in-1 set features vibrant bricks and detailed design, great for kids and adult fans alike.

products.name: LEGO Technic Bugatti Chiron
products.description: An incredibly detailed, 1:8 scale replica of the iconic Bugatti Chiron with a W16 engine with moving pistons, a gearbox, a rear spoiler, and 3,599 pieces.

products.name: LEGO Star Wars Millennium Falcon
products.description: The most-detailed LEGO Millennium Falcon ever! With 7,541 pieces, this incredible model features a detailed interior, rotating turrets, and retractable landing legs.

products.name: LEGO Architecture Eiffel Tower
products.description: Build a stunning 1,665-piece replica of the iconic Eiffel Tower. Standing over 59 cm tall, this set celebrates the artistry of the original landmark with incredible detail.

products.name: LEGO City Police Station
products.description: A fully equipped police station with a jail, garage, helicopter pad, and more. Includes police officers, a thief, and all the gear needed for exciting city adventures.

products.name: LEGO Harry Potter Hogwarts Castle
products.description: With over 6,000 pieces, this stunning display model is packed with iconic locations from the Wizarding World including the Great Hall, Chamber of Secrets, and Whomping Willow.

products.name: LEGO Technic Land Rover Defender
products.description: A faithful recreation of the iconic Land Rover Defender with independent suspension, winch, and detailed interior. 2,573 pieces of engineering excellence.

products.name: LEGO Ideas NASA Apollo Saturn V
products.description: Build and display this 1:110 scale model of the NASA Apollo Saturn V rocket. Standing over 1 metre tall with 1,969 pieces, it includes 3 mini Saturn V rockets.

products.name: LEGO Minecraft The Nether Fortress
products.description: Explore the fiery Nether world and battle blazes and wither skeletons in this action-packed set. Features a buildable fortress with lava falls and treasure chest.

products.name: LEGO Creator Expert Big Ben
products.description: Recreate the iconic London landmark with this stunning 4,163-piece set. Featuring a detailed clock face, interior details, and Elizabeth Tower surroundings.

products.name: Apple iPhone 15 Pro
products.description: Featuring the A17 Pro chip, a titanium design, and a 48MP main camera with 5x optical zoom. With Dynamic Island, USB-C, and the longest battery life in an iPhone.

products.name: Samsung 65" QLED 4K Smart TV
products.description: Quantum Dot technology delivers brilliant colour and contrast. With a 120Hz refresh rate, built-in streaming apps, and Alexa compatibility for the ultimate home cinema experience.

products.name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
products.description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with eight microphones and Auto NC Optimizer. Exceptional sound quality with 30 hours battery life and multipoint connection.

products.name: Adidas Ultraboost 23 Running Shoes
products.description: Responsive Boost cushioning and a Primeknit+ upper deliver unrivalled comfort and energy return. Designed for long-distance running with continental rubber outsole.

products.name: Dyson V15 Detect Cordless Vacuum
products.description: Laser Detect technology reveals invisible dust on hard floors. Powerful suction across all floor types with up to 60 minutes run time and a 5-stage filtration system.

products.name: Kindle Paperwhite (11th Gen)
products.description: A 6.8" display and thinner borders deliver a reading experience like no other. IPX8 waterproof, weeks of battery life, and adjustable warm light for comfortable reading.

products.name: Nespresso Vertuo Next Coffee Machine
products.description: Brew five cup sizes from espresso to alto with a touch of a button. Centrifusion technology reads each capsule's barcode to deliver the perfect cup every time.

products.name: Levi's 501 Original Jeans
products.description: The original blue jean since 1873. Straight fit with a button fly, crafted from heavyweight denim. A timeless wardrobe staple that only gets better with age.

products.name: Polaroid Now I-Type Instant Camera
products.description: A modern take on the original Polaroid camera with improved autofocus and double exposure mode. Works with i-Type and 600 film for instant analogue memories.

products.name: GoPro HERO12 Black
products.description: Shoot stunning 5.3K video, 27MP photos, and incredible slow-motion footage. Waterproof to 10m with HyperSmooth 6.0 stabilisation and a 2-hour battery life.

products.name: Red Bull Energy Drink (24-pack)
products.description: The original energy drink that gives you wings. Packed with taurine, B-vitamins, caffeine, and sugars to fuel your body and mind whenever you need a boost.

products.name: Coca-Cola Classic (12-pack cans)
products.description: The world's most iconic soft drink. Crisp, refreshing taste that has delighted people since 1886. Ice cold Coke is always the real thing.

products.name: Starbucks Cold Brew Coffee (4-pack)
products.description: Smooth, bold, and less acidic than hot-brewed coffee. Slow-steeped for 20 hours and served black or with a splash of cream for a refreshing cold coffee experience.

products.name: Gatorade Thirst Quencher (12-pack)
products.description: Scientifically formulated to help replace fluids and electrolytes lost in sweat. Trusted by athletes worldwide for over 50 years of proven hydration performance.

products.name: Monster Energy (24-pack)
products.description: A powerful blend of caffeine, taurine, ginseng, and B-vitamins. Monster delivers an intense energy boost to tackle your workout, workday, or late-night gaming session.

products.name: Oat Milk (6-pack)
products.description: Creamy, plant-based oat milk that's perfect for coffee, cereal, or drinking straight. Naturally sweet with no added sugar, and packed with fibre and vitamin D.

products.name: The Last of Us Part II – PS4
products.description: An emotional and gripping survival action game set five years after the events of the original. Features stunning visuals, brutal combat, and an unforgettable story.

products.name: Elden Ring – PS5
products.description: An epic open-world action RPG from FromSoftware and George R.R. Martin. Explore the Lands Between, discover powerful weapons, and battle terrifying bosses in a vast open world.

products.name: God of War Ragnarök – PS5
products.description: Embark on an epic and heartfelt journey as Kratos and Atreus struggle with holding on and letting go. Features stunning visuals and intense combat across the nine realms.

products.name: Minecraft – Nintendo Switch
products.description: Create and survive in an infinitely generated world of blocks. Play solo or with friends in cross-platform multiplayer. The best-selling game of all time on the go.

products.name: Xbox Series X
products.description: The fastest, most powerful Xbox ever. Play thousands of titles across four generations with 4K gaming at up to 120FPS. Quick Resume and Smart Delivery included.

products.name: Xbox Series S
products.description: The smallest, sleekest Xbox ever. All-digital gaming at 1440p up to 120FPS, Quick Resume, and access to hundreds of games with Xbox Game Pass.

products.name: Asus ROG Gaming Laptop
products.description: Powered by AMD Ryzen 9 and NVIDIA RTX 4080, this 16" gaming beast delivers extraordinary performance. Features a 240Hz QHD display and per-key RGB keyboard.

products.name: Dell UltraSharp 27" 4K Monitor
products.description: Stunning 4K resolution with IPS technology for accurate colour. USB-C connectivity, factory calibrated, and with a virtually borderless three-sided design.

products.name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
products.description: An advanced wireless mouse with ultra-fast MagSpeed electromagnetic scrolling and 8,000 DPI tracking on any surface, including glass. Works across multiple devices.

products.name: Keychron K2 Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: A compact 75% wireless mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches, RGB backlight, and macOS/Windows compatibility. Perfect for home and office.

products.name: Anker 100W USB-C Charging Hub
products.description: A 7-in-1 USB-C hub with 100W pass-through charging, 4K HDMI, USB-A ports, and an SD card reader. The perfect compact companion for your MacBook or laptop.

products.name: Avocado Toast Seasoning Blend
products.description: A handcrafted blend of sea salt, garlic, red pepper flakes, and herbs. Sprinkle on avocado toast, eggs, salads, and more for a bold, restaurant-quality flavour.

products.name: Premium Greek Yoghurt
products.description: Thick, creamy, and protein-packed authentic Greek yoghurt. Made from whole milk and live cultures with no artificial additives. Perfect for breakfast or healthy snacking.

products.name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil (1L)
products.description: Cold-pressed from hand-picked olives in southern Italy, this premium olive oil delivers a rich, fruity flavour with a peppery finish. Perfect for cooking and dressings.

products.name: Manuka Honey (500g)
products.description: Authentic New Zealand Manuka honey with a UMF 15+ rating. Packed with natural antioxidants and antibacterial properties. A premium superfood for wellness.

products.name: Protein Powder – Chocolate Fudge
products.description: 25g of whey protein per serving with only 2g of sugar. Informed Sport certified with natural chocolate flavour. Supports muscle recovery and lean muscle growth.

products.name: Apple Watch Series 9
products.description: The most advanced Apple Watch yet. With a brighter Always-On Retina display, Double Tap gesture, and advanced health sensors including blood oxygen and ECG.

products.name: Philips Hue Starter Kit
products.description: Transform your home with smart LED lighting. Includes 3 colour-changing bulbs and a Bridge hub. Control via app, voice, or schedule — 16 million colours.

products.name: iPad Pro 12.9" (M2)
products.description: Supercharged by the M2 chip with a Liquid Retina XDR display, ProMotion 120Hz, and Thunderbolt connectivity. The ultimate iPad for creative professionals.

products.name: LEGO Speed Champions Ferrari SF90 Stradale
products.description: Build the legendary Ferrari SF90 Stradale in authentic LEGO detail. This 564-piece set includes a minifigure driver and accurately captures the iconic Ferrari design.

products.name: LEGO Botanical Collection – Wildflower Bouquet
products.description: Create a beautiful, never-wilting wildflower bouquet with 939 pieces. Features cornflowers, lavender, dandelions, and more. A stunning display piece for any room.

products.name: LEGO Technic Liebherr R 9800 Excavator
products.description: A colossal 4,108-piece Technic replica of the iconic Liebherr R 9800 mining excavator with a working crane, detailed bucket, and realistic moving features.

products.name: LEGO Icons Tranquil Garden
products.description: Build a serene Japanese rock garden with 1,363 pieces. Features a pagoda, raked gravel patterns, cherry blossom trees, and a koi pond for a relaxing build experience.

products.name: LEGO Marvel Avengers Tower
products.description: Recreate the iconic Avengers Tower with 5,201 pieces across 5 themed floors. Includes 31 minifigures, a Quinjet, and locations from across the MCU.

products.name: Yoga Mat – Non-Slip Cork
products.description: An eco-friendly cork and natural rubber yoga mat with superior grip in hot or humid conditions. 5mm cushioning for joint comfort with alignment guides.

products.name: Resistance Bands Set (5 bands)
products.description: A complete set of five fabric resistance bands with light to extra-heavy resistance. Perfect for home workouts, physical therapy, and strength training.

products.name: Ray-Ban Aviator Classic Sunglasses
products.description: The iconic aviator design that has defined cool since 1937. Lightweight metal frame with crystal lenses providing 100% UV protection. A timeless classic.

products.name: Bose QuietComfort 45 Headphones
products.description: Acclaimed noise cancellation lets you hear nothing but your music. With up to 24 hours battery, TriPort acoustic architecture, and a plush earcup design.

products.name: Stanley Quencher Tumbler (40oz)
products.description: The iconic insulated tumbler that keeps your drinks cold for 2 days and hot for 7 hours. BPA-free and dishwasher safe with a sturdy handle and reusable straw.

products.name: DJI Mini 3 Pro Drone
products.description: Ultra-light drone under 249g with 4K/60fps video, 48MP photos, and obstacle sensing. Up to 34-min flight time with a compact foldable design perfect for travellers.

products.name: Braun Series 9 Pro Electric Shaver
products.description: Powered by SyncroSonic technology with 40,000 micro-vibrations per minute for a close shave in one stroke. Includes a SmartCare Center for automatic cleaning.

products.name: Atomic Habits – James Clear
products.description: The no.1 bestselling self-improvement book. Learn how tiny 1% changes can transform your habits and lead to remarkable results in health, productivity, and happiness.

products.name: The Design of Everyday Things
products.description: Don Norman's classic guide to human-centered design. Essential reading for designers, engineers, and anyone curious about why products work — or why they fail.

products.name: Dune – Frank Herbert
products.description: The greatest science fiction novel ever written. Set on the desert planet Arrakis, Dune is a story of politics, religion, ecology, and the birth of a legend.

products.name: You Don't Know JS – Kyle Simpson
products.description: A deep dive into the core mechanisms of the JavaScript language. Six books covering scope, closures, the 'this' keyword, prototypes, types, and asynchrony.

products.name: Clean Code – Robert C. Martin
products.description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship. Uncle Bob's essential guide to writing code that is readable, maintainable, and a pleasure to work with.

products.name: Scuf Reflex Pro Controller
products.description: The ultimate PS5 performance controller with four back paddles, trigger stops, and instant remapping. Grip and weight tuned for competitive gaming.

products.name: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Headset
products.description: Premium gaming headset with multi-system active noise cancellation, 360-degree spatial audio, and a dual-battery system for infinite play time.

products.name: LEGO Icons Concorde
products.description: Build the legendary supersonic passenger jet with 2,083 pieces. Features retractable landing gear, tilting nose cone, and impressive 1:78 scale. A must for aviation fans.

products.name: LEGO Ninjago City Gardens
products.description: A stunning 5,685-piece modular skyline set featuring multiple shops, apartments, and a rooftop garden. A showpiece for any LEGO display collection.

products.name: Pringles Variety Pack (12 tins)
products.description: A crispy variety of Original, Sour Cream & Onion, Cheese, and BBQ flavours. The iconic stackable crisp in a resealable tin, perfect for sharing or snacking solo.

products.name: Haribo Gold Bears (1kg)
products.description: The original and best gummy bear in a massive 1kg sharing bag. Five fruit flavours — raspberry, strawberry, pineapple, lemon, and orange — in every chewy bite.

products.name: Fever-Tree Premium Tonic Water (24-pack)
products.description: Made with natural spring water and quinine from the fever tree, these premium mixers are the perfect companion for gin, vodka, and other spirits.

products.name: LEGO Art World Map
products.description: Build a stunning 11,695-piece world map spanning 40" × 25" that doubles as wall art. Includes brick-built sea creatures and ships for a personalized display.
